topic: The 10-minute conversation that gets your teen off the couch
caption:
The conversation that changes everything takes 10 minutes.

Ask your teen what they'd do with $200 this month and just listen. You'll be surprised what they say.

From there, help them pick one small skill they already have and turn it into a first job this week.

Give them a head start → hustleup.us

#parentingteens #raisingteens #teenparenting #momsofteens #dadsofteens #lifeskills #moneyskills #teenconfidence #sidehustle #teenmoney #parentingwin #motivatedteens #raisingentrepreneurs #screentimetips
alt_text: A parent and teen sitting together at a kitchen table having a relaxed conversation over drinks, with a warm and approachable atmosphere.

copy.headline: One Conversation That Gets Your Teen Moving
copy.body: Ask your teen: 'What would you do with $200 this month?' Then listen. That one question shifts them from passive to thinking like someone with a plan.
copy.caption:
The conversation that changes everything takes 10 minutes.

Ask your teen what they'd do with $200 this month and just listen. You'll be surprised what they say.

From there, help them pick one small skill they already have and turn it into a first job this week.

Give them a head start → hustleup.us
